name: The Mint Corporation
summary: The Mint Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provides vertically integrated prepaid card and payroll services primarily in the United Arab Emirates. It manages the issuance, administration, customer support, payment processing, set-up, sponsorship, and reporting of the cards and related activities to government authorities. The company also offers point of sale terminals, mobile airtime top-up, and merchant network solutions, as well as insurance and overdraft services. The company was formerly known as Mint Technology Corp. and changed its name to The Mint Corporation in August 2013. The Mint Corporation was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada. The Mint Corporation is a subsidiary of Global Business Services.
